text.title: Google Ads Keyword Strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Google Ads Keyword Strategy. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Ad group mixes 'how to X' (informational) and 'buy X' (transactional); CTR 0.3%; quality score 3/10.
antipattern.fix: Split into two ad groups; rewrite ad copy + landing pages per intent.

antipattern.symptom: Broad-match-only campaign; 65% of spend on irrelevant queries surfaced in STR; CPA inflated 80%.
antipattern.fix: Migrate to exact + phrase + tight negatives; backfill negatives from STR history.

antipattern.symptom: STR not reviewed in 3 months; 40% of spend on irrelevant queries with no negatives applied.
antipattern.fix: Wire weekly STR review (named owner); apply new negatives within 48 hours of discovery.
